definitions: n. 右旋糖（一种单糖，常作为甜味剂）

examples.text: Check the labels on sweet products you buy. Glucose, fructose, sucrose, maltose, lactose, dextrose, and starch are all forms of sugar.
examples.explanation: 查看你购买的甜味产品标签。glucose、fructose、sucrose、maltose、lactose、dextrose 和 starch 都是糖的形式；其中 dextrose 指“右旋糖”。

source.text: 糖类怎样影响大脑 -Nicole Avena

reviewSessions.example_text: Just check the labels on sweet products you buy. Glucose, fructose, sucrose, maltose, lactose, dextrose, and starch are all forms of sugar. So are high-fructose corn syrup,
expected_definitions: n. 右旋糖（一种单糖，常作为甜味剂）
reviewSessions.feedback: 答出了“是一种糖”，但“dex-和decimal相关、10”不正确；应理解为右旋糖/葡萄糖一类的单糖。
matched_points: 知道 dextrose 是一种糖
missing_points: 未答出“右旋糖”这一关键义项
未说明其为单糖，常作甜味剂

reviewSessions.example_text: Just check the labels on sweet products you buy. Glucose, fructose, sucrose, maltose, lactose, dextrose, and starch are all forms of sugar. So are high-fructose corn syrup,
expected_definitions: n. 右旋糖（一种单糖，常作为甜味剂）
reviewSessions.feedback: 这次没填对，正确答案是 dextrose。
missing_points: 需要回忆出目标词 dextrose
